channel.title: Protein Design Podcast
channel.description: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research
channel.itunes:author: Eva Dai
channel.itunes:summary: Daily automated digest of protein design, antibody engineering & enzyme design research

item.title: Daily Podcast 2026-06-09
item.description: The biggest surprise coming out of today’s reading is how quickly the community is moving from “static pictures” to “personalized, dynamic blueprints.” For decades we built cancer vaccines around shared tumor‑associated antigens like HER2 or NY‑ESO‑1, assuming that a one‑size‑fits‑all peptide could break tolerance. | That same theme of moving beyond a single structure appears in the protein‑dynamics roadmap. | SurfDesign takes the surface‑first idea even further.
item.itunes:author: Eva Dai
item.itunes:summary: The biggest surprise coming out of today’s reading is how quickly the community is moving from “static pictures” to “personalized, dynamic blueprints.” For decades we built cancer vaccines around shared tumor‑associated antigens like HER2 or NY‑ESO‑1, assuming that a one‑size‑fits‑all peptide could break tolerance. | That same theme of moving beyond a single structure appears in the protein‑dynamics roadmap. | SurfDesign takes the surface‑first idea even further.
